task_description: I want to create a project that generates, evaluates and classifies music generated by AI. The system can create the song with a Google Gemini API, or a chutes API, can select the output language, the style, presets, all based on suno (docs.suno.com) and optimized for it. Create presets for brazilian catholic song predefined, and the system must be able to generate lyrics and EVAL output (good, bad, why, what to improve) and create a system based on karpathy's autoresearch (https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch) to improve the quality for a next generation.
